name: Chocolate Cheesecake Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate chips and 1/3 cup of butter in a medium bowl. Microwave for 3 minutes to melt.
2. Add graham cracker crumbs and nuts (if desired). Mix well.
3. Grease a 9x13 pan.
4. Press half of the mixture into the pan.
5. Reserve the remaining mixture.
6. In a saucepan, combine sugar and boiling water. Bring to a boil and stir until the sugar is dissolved.
7. Add 1/4 cup of butter. Place dry milk in a medium bowl.
8. Beat in the sugar-water-butter mixture. Beat for 1 minute until smooth.
9. Beat in cream cheese, egg, and vanilla until the mixture is smooth and creamy.
10. Pour into the crumb-lined pan and top with the reserved crumb mixture.
11. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
12. Cool to room temperature and chill before cutting into bars.
